title: Enterprise Operations Copilot
tagline: Natural-language operations over fragmented enterprise data.
problem: Ops teams drown in fragmented systems and tribal knowledge, losing time hunting for answers across tools.
highlights: Agentic planning that reasons across multiple tools
Workflow automation for repetitive operational tasks
Guarded execution against systems of record

title: AI Codebase Intelligence Platform
tagline: Turns hundreds of repositories into queryable engineering knowledge.
problem: Large orgs have hundreds of repos, many teams, unknown dependencies, and tribal knowledge buried in people's heads. Ask "how does Campaign Builder work?" and the answer is too often "ask Bob." That's a business risk.
highlights: Maps relationships across a master repo of symlinked repositories
Analyzes source, package dependencies, API relationships, service calls, infra, and docs
Generates architecture diagrams, data flows, system maps, and dependency graphs

features.name: Architecture Generation
features.desc: Creates system diagrams directly from source code.

features.name: AI Knowledge Layer
features.desc: Engineers ask natural-language questions about the system.

features.name: Impact Analysis
features.desc: Predicts the downstream effects of a change before you make it.

examples.a: Searches repos for the relevant services, controllers, downstream integrations, and database access, then generates an architecture explanation.

examples.q: What's impacted if I modify CreateCampaign?
examples.a: Traces dependencies and produces an impact analysis with an architecture graph.
Scans code, READMEs, and package relationships to produce living documentation.

title: Spec-Driven Development Harness
tagline: A company harness that scales AI-assisted development across an organization.
problem: As AI-assisted development matured, adopting open-source agent and spec frameworks directly clashed with company-specific requirements, internal engineering standards, governance, long-term maintainability, and staying aligned with upstream improvements.
highlights: Designed a harness on top of the open-source spec-driven development ecosystem instead of forking and heavily modifying it
Extends workflows with company-specific context and organizational standards
Provides reusable agent workflows and templates
Creates a consistent developer experience across teams

features.name: Consistency
features.desc: Teams follow the same specification-driven workflow.

features.name: Maintainability
features.desc: Adopt upstream improvements without rebuilding customizations.

features.name: AI Readiness
features.desc: Agents have company-specific context and engineering standards.

features.name: Scalability
features.desc: New teams onboard faster on established workflows.

takeaway: Rather than focusing solely on using AI tools, I focused on creating the systems, standards, and developer experience that let AI-assisted development scale across an organization — adoption, architecture, governance, and scale, not just prompting an LLM.

title: Campaign Builder Platform
tagline: A multi-step platform for creating and managing marketing campaigns.
problem: Marketing teams needed to build and manage complex, multi-step campaigns without pulling in engineering for every change.
highlights: Multi-step campaign builder shipped as a SolidJS micro-frontend
Spring Boot backend-for-frontend orchestrating downstream services
Layered validation architecture across client, BFF, and domain
Caching strategy for high-read configuration data

title: Context Engineering Framework
tagline: Reusable context strategies that improve AI output quality.
problem: LLMs perform poorly without relevant context. The fix is structured context-assembly pipelines that give agents the right information at the right time.

title: AI Incident Commander
tagline: Detects, triages, and narrates incidents in real time.
problem: During incidents, engineers waste critical minutes correlating signals across logs and dashboards.
highlights: Reads logs and telemetry across systems
Generates postmortem drafts and coordinates comms

title: AI Evaluation & Observability Platform
tagline: Measuring and monitoring AI system performance in production-like environments.
problem: AI systems are hard to trust without measurement. This tooling makes quality, cost, and reliability observable.

title: Engineering Workflow Automation Agents
tagline: Agents that automate repetitive engineering tasks with human oversight.
problem: Engineers spend hours on repetitive workflow tasks that agents can draft — but only with safe, human-in-the-loop controls.

title: AI Architecture Review Agent
tagline: Evaluates software architectures and recommends improvements.
problem: Architecture reviews are scarce senior-engineer time. An agent can give a first-pass critique across scalability, reliability, performance, security, and maintainability.

title: Secure Image Processing Pipeline
tagline: A secure upload workflow that sanitizes images before processing.
problem: User-uploaded images are a malware vector and must be neutralized before any downstream processing touches them.
highlights: Content Disarm & Reconstruction (CDR) integration to neutralize malicious payloads
Robust error handling and quarantine paths

title: OAuth Integration Framework
tagline: Reusable authentication infrastructure for secure service-to-service communication.
problem: Downstream enterprise services required secure, consistent service-to-service authentication instead of ad-hoc token handling.

title: Row-Level Security Architecture
tagline: Role-based row-level security enforcing data isolation across users and services.
problem: Multi-tenant data needed fine-grained isolation across distinct roles without leaking across boundaries.

title: JSONB Data Model Migration
tagline: Evolved a rigid schema to a flexible JSON-based model with backward compatibility.
problem: A simple, rigid schema could no longer represent evolving payment options without breaking existing clients.

title: Publishing Workflow Engine
tagline: A scheduled publishing system that coordinates downstream publication.
problem: Pending campaigns needed reliable, auditable, scheduled publication with retry safety.

title: Enterprise Validation Service
tagline: A layered validation architecture for sync and async requirements.
problem: Complex inputs needed validation at multiple layers with consistent, aggregated error responses.

title: Metadata & Caching Service
tagline: Metadata retrieval with intelligent caching to reduce latency.

title: Population Count Processing Service
tagline: Backend services validating and calculating campaign audience populations.

title: Observability & Monitoring Platform
tagline: Observability strategies for system visibility and faster incident response.
highlights: Outcome: identified gateway-timeout patterns and reduced troubleshooting effort

title: Gateway Timeout Investigation
tagline: Root-caused complex 504 timeouts across distributed systems.

title: Cyber Logging Migration
tagline: Led discovery and planning to migrate logging to a next-gen security platform.
highlights: Migration to a next-generation security logging platform

title: Enterprise Validation Framework
tagline: A reusable validation architecture for sync and async rules across complex inputs.

title: Component Library & Storybook System
tagline: Reusable UI components and Storybook docs for consistency and productivity.
highlights: Components: dropdowns, tabs, progress indicators, modals, accordions, form controls

title: Advanced Image Upload Workflow
tagline: A complete upload experience: preview, crop, validate, secure submit.

title: Dynamic Theme Management System
tagline: Persistent theming with user preferences across sessions.

title: Navigation & Workflow Orchestration
tagline: A custom workflow navigation system controlling progression without traditional routing.

title: Accessibility Modernization
tagline: Reviews and improvements for a more inclusive user experience.

title: Frontend Performance & Data Layer Optimization
tagline: Caching, memoization, and efficient resource management for responsiveness.

title: Debounced Save Queue
tagline: Lossless autosave under heavy, racing user edits.
problem: Rapid user edits generated excessive, racing save requests that overwhelmed the backend and risked lost work.

title: Developer Resource Portal
tagline: A centralized hub for engineering tools, repos, and resources.
problem: Engineers wasted time hunting for tools, repositories, and documentation scattered across systems.
highlights: Centralized access to tools, repositories, and engineering resources
Information architecture tuned for fast retrieval
